ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "est" TEXT /* Date of weather data collection */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Celsius */,
  "mean_temperature" REAL /* Mean temperature in Celsius */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Celsius */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point in Celsius */,
  "mean_dew_point" REAL /* Mean dew point in Celsius */,
  "min_dew_point" REAL /* Minimum dew point in Celsius */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity */,
  "max_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Maximum sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "mean_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Mean sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "min_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Minimum sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "max_visibility" REAL /* Maximum visibility in km */,
  "mean_visibility" REAL /* Mean visibility in km */,
  "min_visibility" REAL /* Minimum visibility in km */,
  "max_wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed in km/h */,
  "mean_wind_speed" REAL /* Mean wind speed in km/h */,
  "max_gust_speed" REAL /* Maximum gust speed in km/h */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover */,
  "events" REAL /* Events (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  "wind_dir_degrees" TEXT /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag of the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of data collection */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection point */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the data collection point */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("est"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather station (e.g., ground, buoy, satellite) */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., weather station, radar, satellite) */,
  "source_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitations" (
  "precipitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation record */,
  "weather_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  "precipitation_amount" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the precipitation event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the precipitation event */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the precipitation (e.g., light, moderate, heavy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precipitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitations_weather_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("est")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_covers" (
  "cloud_cover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud cover record */,
  "weather_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "cloud_type" TEXT /* Type of cloud (e.g., cumulus, stratus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cloud_cover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cloud_covers_weather_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("est")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "wind_direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction record */,
  "weather_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of direction measurement */,
  "gust_speed" REAL /* Gust speed at the time of direction measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_directions_weather_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("est")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, meteorologist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "weather_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("est"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_sources" (
  "weather_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_data_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_types" (
  "weather_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_data_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_stations" (
  "weather_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_data_id", "station_id")
)
